label: workflow_save persists a workflow distilled from a completed task
query: First, create a file named notes.txt containing exactly the word: alpha. After the file is written, save what you just did as a reusable workflow named save_notes using the workflow_save tool. I confirm you should save it — no need to ask again.
notes: Proves chat authoring end to end: the model performs a small task, then distills it into a persisted workflow row with at least one structured step that passes the run-time contract preflight (runnable: true) — a true save→run round trip, since workflow_save now rejects unrunnable saves. The save confirmation is pre-granted in the query to match the workflow_save nudge's user-confirm contract. Scored against the database diff (workflowSaved), not just the transcript.
